data.body: LIVE-EVAL BLOCKED by discovered bug 2340-1b72-109a-43d7 (linked discovered_from). Probe: 'rebar criteria eval project.portability --runs 1' fails deterministically at 2026-07-16T02:05:13Z with ValueError: no eval solver for prompt 'plan-review-project-portability' (from eval_solver.run_case). Root cause: calibrate_criterion passes the dash prompt-id to run_case, whose _criterion_id strips 'plan-review-' to 'project-portability' (dash) and misses the dot-keyed registry entry 'project.portability'. This is a src/rebar defect; 21dd's DD-3 forbids fixing it here. NOT a transient/model failure, so the 3-attempt retry protocol does not apply. Offline calibration is fully done and green: eval corpus (PORT-F1..F4 finding + PORT-N1..N4 pass), finding-contract notes (4 labels), gold_set, spec_contract, and calibrate_criterion metric-math via injected perfect solve (recall 1.0 / false_accept 0.0 / agreement 1.0 / kappa 1.0). The operator-attested live-threshold AC cannot be met until 2340 is fixed and landed. Escalated to user for scope decision (fix+early-land the core bug vs descope).
